description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test, build, deploy using the python:3.8 Docker image for all jobs. Add a lint job in the test stage that runs pip install tox then tox -e lint. Add a test-coverage job in the test stage that runs pip install tox then tox -e cov and stores the htmlcov directory as an artifact. Add a wheel job in the build stage that runs pip install tox then tox -e wheel and saves the dist directory as an artifact. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that depends on test-coverage, creates a public/coverage directory, moves htmlcov/* into it, and publishes the public directory as a pages artifact. Add a deploy-pypi job in the deploy stage that runs only on tag names matching /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+([abc]\d*)?$/ and not on branches, runs pip install twine then twine upload dist/* -u ${PYPI_USER} -p ${PYPI_PASS} to publish the wheel to PyPI.
